message:
feat(sandbox): harden filesystem path validation at manifest and policy layers

Add validate_sandbox_fs_path, validate_connector_state_subpath, and
is_absolute_sandbox_fs_path to fcp-manifest. SandboxSection::validate()
now rejects relative paths and path traversal inside $CONNECTOR_STATE.

Refactor sandbox.rs to use compile_paths returning Result with
descriptive SandboxError::PolicyCompilationFailed instead of silently
discarding bad paths via filter_map. expand_path delegates to the new
manifest validation, eliminating duplicated traversal-sanitization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
